title: Hard-Start Decreasing VO2max
description: Maximize time near VO2max with fatigue-managed pacing
purpose: Maximize time near VO2max with fatigue-managed pacing

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/5. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 75%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/10. 45s at 130%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 0:45 at 130%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 130% for 45s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 45s.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/10. Power: 130-130%, Cadence: 90-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 2 of 10.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/10. Duration: 3:15. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/10. You're building something real here. 8 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1/5. 115%, 90-95 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 23% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/10. 0:45 at 130%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/5. 130% FTP, Seated. 45s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 130%, 95-100 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/10. 130% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 30% into session. 130%, 95-100 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/10. You're 31% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4/10. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 4/10. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/10. You've accumulated 4min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 36% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 130%, 85-90 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 130% × 45s. Then 33min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/10. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 130% for 45s. Then 33min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/10. 130% FTP, 85-90 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 44% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 3:15 at 115%. Then 4:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 44% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 44% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 44% done. 115% for 3:15. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 50% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 12min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 4:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 4:00. Then 26min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 4:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 7/10. 34 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 56% done. 3 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 7/10. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 130% × 45s. Seated, 90-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 57% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 57% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 57% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 57% done. 115% for 3:15. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 63% done. 0 intervals left. 18 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 18 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 70% done. 1 intervals left. 17 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 9. 16min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% through. This is your workout. Own it. 130% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 9. 1 to go. 17 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 3:15 at 115%. Empty the tank. You've got 14 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 3:15 at 115%. Then 14min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 3:15 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 115% × 3:15. Then 14min cooldown. Leave nothing.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 46 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 20min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 46 minutes of work done. 10 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 46 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 76% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 83% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 83% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 83% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
